headlines.headline: Yorvov Pharmaceuticals reports record quarterly revenue, up 10% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue growth of 10% provides clear positive fundamental momentum for the company.

headlines.headline: Yorvov Pharmaceuticals reports 8% increase in customer acquisition

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
